findings.description: The three bullet items (・人の10倍勉強しろ, ・１回読んで覚えられなければ, ・英文Xの中で1000本ノック) are collapsed into a single section entity. The image shows them as visually distinct bulleted lines. Content is accurate; the collapse is a structural choice, not an error.

reviewer_notes: All 12 entities match the page image. The six learning-method bullet entries are correctly typed as 'term' with surface+definition structure. The caveat paragraph (p008::11) text matches the visible image text. zh/en translations are accurate throughout. Leaf_count=18 in header reflects downstream expansion count, not entity count; no anomaly.
